connections.def: from a presumed derivative of 622; ruin or loss (physical, spiritual or eternal):--damnable(-nation), destruction, die, perdition, X perish, pernicious ways, waste. see GREEK for
from a primary ollumi (to destroy; a prolonged form); ruin, i.e. death,

connections.gloss: destruction, discomfiture, trouble, tumult, vexation, vexed.
(ac-) curse(-d, -d thing), dedicated thing, things which should have been utterly destroyed, (appointed to) utter destruction, devoted (thing), net.

connections.def: from 2507; demolition; figuratively, extinction:--destruction, pulling down. see GREEK for
